channel.title: Russian Words
channel.description: Learn Russian one word at a time. Each short episode teaches a single word or construction through example sentences, patterns, idioms, and cultural context. Designed for comprehensible input — listen repeatedly until it sticks. From A0 to B1.
channel.itunes:author: Russian Words
channel.itunes:summary: Learn Russian one word at a time. Each short episode teaches a single word or construction through example sentences, patterns, idioms, and cultural context. Designed for comprehensible input — listen repeatedly until it sticks. From A0 to B1.

item.title: Episode 001: Привет и Пока
item.itunes:title: Привет и Пока
item.description: Hello and goodbye. Learn привет (hi) and пока (bye) — the two most important words in Russian. Example sentences, a mini-dialogue, cultural notes about formal vs informal greetings, and a classic Russian film reference.
